channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: AmphoraeFix
item.description: Texture fix for Amphorae mod.

item.title: Extended Eye Colors
item.description: Adds a hex scroller for more customisation!

item.title: Swixy Claim Chunk
item.description: Claiming made easy. Press [P], click a chunk, and it's yours!

item.title: Strata: Infinite diffusion worldgen
item.description: early preview: infinite diffusion terrain and climate.

item.title: Veneer
item.description: Adds veneers for cheaper chiseling details.

item.title: Vintage Canvas
item.description: Craft canvases, mix paint, and use brushes to decorate your world!

item.title: Frontiers Classes
item.description: Character class and progression system.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Frontiers RPG
item.description: An ARPG system for Vintage Story

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Signals Link EP
item.description: Extends Signals mod with control elements for interacting with the Electrical Progressive mod.

item.title: Scraps Revived
item.description: Restore and recycle the clutter from the ruins.

item.title: Signals Link
item.description: Extends Signals mod with sensors and control elements for interacting with other mods

item.title: Offline Item Cooler
item.description: Adds a Multiplayer-Friendly vessel,Food inside stops spoiling whenever the player is logged out.

item.title: Ambien's Easy Chunk Claim
item.description: Simple chunk claiming made for servers

item.title: FETweaks
item.description: Mod tweaks for Frontier Esoterica Season 1.

item.title: InventoryWheelFix
item.description: Fixes the mouse wheel behavior in immersive mouse mode, when the player inventory is scrollable.

item.title: Rudiments
item.description: Pre-industrial craft, done properly. Fibre, clay, kilns, stone tools, mud — one step at a time.

item.title: Body Fat by Tasshroom
item.description: Body Fat - Stuff your face and save up those calories for the long journey ahead

item.title: GGBC's Repair
item.description: A very lightweight mod for balanced item repair. Compatible with ItemRarity, xSkills, and others

item.title: Stamina Mod
item.description: Adds stamina to animals. Exhaustion slows them. Tired predators give up the chase.

item.title: KCs Dragon Player!
item.description: Adds an anthropomorphic dragon player model to the game

item.title: Vampirism
item.description: Become a creature of the night, drink blood, see in the dark and never touch silver again

item.title: VSNH Currency
item.description: Time Based Currency

item.title: VSNH Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks and modifications for the Vintage Story New Horizons server.

item.title: Craft Everything
item.description: Adds new crafting recipes for existing items in Vintage Story

item.title: ProjectL Interactables
item.description: Door, Keys, Trap everything to make a good labyrinth

item.title: Gearlock Firearms
item.description: Adds firearms powered by the gearlock mechanism

item.title: CB Guilds
item.description: Guild mod for my personal server

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.
